subcodes.first_line: O thou branch that quivereth at the breathings of the blessed Tree, thou must loosen thy tongue in praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المهتز من نفحات السدره المبارکه ینبغی لک ان یدلع لسانک بالثناء علی
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
